subcodes.first_line: O Ghulám-Riḍá! Strive thou that thou mayest attain unto that which is great in the sight of God. Today the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام رضا جهد نما تا فائز شوی بانچه که لدی الله عظیم است امروز آفتاب حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
